name: Scrambled Mexican Tofu
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons chopped fresh chives or cilantro
1 fresh tomato, peeled, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, beat the egg whites until broken up and just beginning to foam.
2. Crumble the tofu finely and add to the egg mixture. Add the soy sauce, turmeric, and pepper. Set aside.
3. In a large nonstick skillet over medium heat, cook the tomato, onions, garlic, chili, and cumin until the onion is translucent and all the liquid has evaporated.
4. Add the egg whites and tofu mixture to the skillet. Stir well with a wooden spoon and scramble over medium heat until the egg whites are cooked.
5. Toss in chives or cilantro.
